name: Cuban Sandwich
tagline: Pressed, golden — pork, ham, swiss, pickles, mustard on Cuban bread
highlight: Pressed crisp; melty inside; nut-free deli classic

hero.alt: Pressed Cuban sandwich cut on a diagonal showing melty cheese
hero.caption: cubano — pressed, golden, layered

healthFacts: Two pork sources, one cheese, two pickles — protein-rich and balanced.
Yellow mustard contains turmeric — anti-inflammatory pop.

steps.title: Slather the bread
steps.detail: Split bread lengthwise. Slather mustard on both inside faces.
steps.tip: Yellow mustard is right; Dijon is wrong. Trust me.

steps.title: Layer in order
steps.detail: Bottom: pickles, then pork, then ham, then swiss. Close. Pressing order matters — cheese kisses ham, pickles meet bread.
steps.tip: Pickles closest to bread keeps the bread crisp during the press.

steps.title: Butter and press
steps.detail: Butter the outsides. Press in a panini press or a hot skillet weighted with another pan, 4 minutes per side until golden and the cheese is fully melted.
steps.tip: No press? A foil-wrapped brick on the sandwich works perfectly.

steps.title: Slice on the bias
steps.detail: Cut on a sharp diagonal — that diagonal cross-section is the whole point of a cubano.
steps.tip: A serrated knife with a sawing motion keeps the layers from squishing.
